holdings.infoBox: IHDG is an equity ETF with a total of 270 individual holdings. The top holdings are Toyota Motor stock at 4.31%, LVMH Moët Hennessy - Louis Vuitton, Société Européenne at 3.60%, Industria de Diseño Textil at 3.44%, Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 3.11%, and BP p.l.c. at 3.10%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree International Hedged Quality Dividend Growth Fund (IHDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of stocks in developed markets outside North America, screened for quality and growth factors. The fund is currency hedged for US investors. IHDG was launched on May 7, 2014 and is issued by WisdomTree.
